services.dentalDesc: Full dental services including preventive care, cosmetic dentistry, and oral surgery.

about.title: About MediCare Plus
about.storyContent: Founded in 1998, MediCare Plus began as a small community clinic with a vision to make quality healthcare accessible to all. Over the past two decades, we have grown into a comprehensive medical institution serving thousands of patients annually, while never losing sight of our founding principles: compassion, excellence, and innovation.
about.storyContent2: Today, we operate a state-of-the-art facility equipped with the latest medical technology, and our team of over 100 board-certified specialists covers more than 20 medical disciplines. We remain committed to providing patient-centered care that treats not just the illness, but the whole person.
about.missionStatement: To provide accessible, high-quality healthcare services with compassion and integrity, empowering individuals and communities to achieve optimal health and well-being.
about.visionStatement: To be the most trusted healthcare provider, recognized for clinical excellence, patient safety, and innovative approaches to medicine.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services, insurance, appointments, and more.

items.q: What insurance plans do you accept?
items.a: We accept most major insurance plans including Medicare, Medicaid, Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna, Cigna, UnitedHealthcare, and many more. Please contact our billing department to verify your specific plan coverage.

items.q: Do you offer sliding scale fees or financial assistance?
items.a: Yes, we offer financial assistance programs for eligible patients based on income and family size. Our financial counselors can help you determine eligibility and guide you through the application process.

items.q: How do I schedule an appointment?
items.a: You can schedule an appointment by calling our main line at +1 (555) 123-4567, using our online patient portal, or visiting our clinic in person. We recommend scheduling in advance for non-urgent visits.

items.q: What should I bring to my appointment?
items.a: Please bring a valid photo ID, your insurance card, a list of current medications, relevant medical records, and any referral forms if required by your insurance plan.
Yes, we offer telehealth appointments for many types of consultations. Our secure video platform allows you to connect with your healthcare provider from the comfort of your home.
General visiting hours are from 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM daily. ICU and specialty units may have restricted visiting hours. Please check with the nursing station for unit-specific policies.

items.q: Can I accompany a patient to their appointment?
items.a: Yes, patients may be accompanied by one family member or caregiver during appointments. For inpatient visits, we allow up to two visitors at a time. Masks may be required in certain areas.

items.q: What COVID-19 safety measures are in place?
items.a: We follow all CDC and local health department guidelines including enhanced cleaning protocols, mandatory masking in clinical areas, social distancing in waiting rooms, and screening at entrances.

items.q: How do I request my medical records?
items.a: You can request your medical records through our patient portal, by completing a medical records release form, or by contacting our Health Information Management department. Please allow 5-7 business days for processing.

items.q: Is parking available at your facility?
items.a: Yes, we offer free parking for all patients and visitors in our main parking garage adjacent to the hospital. Valet parking is also available at the main entrance for a nominal fee. Accessible parking spaces are located near all entrances.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: This privacy policy outlines how MediCare Plus collects, uses, and protects your personal and health information in compliance with HIPAA regulations and applicable data protection laws. We are committed to safeguarding the privacy of our patients and website visitors.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: By using the MediCare Plus website and services, you agree to these terms of service. Our website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Always consult with a qualified healthcare professional for medical concerns.

footer.tagline: Delivering compassionate, world-class healthcare with cutting-edge technology and a patient-first approach.
